best_for: Summarizing long docs, logs, research papers

strengths: code review with full project context
best_for: Frontend UI — leads on visual aesthetics and responsive design
Autonomous multi-file coding tasks that modify files
Code review: codex exec review in project directory
Fact-checking or tasks needing web-grounded knowledge

strengths: regex, data transforms, parsing, shell scripts
best_for: Low-level tasks: regex, data transforms, parsing

fan_out.name: Fan-Out / Fan-In
fan_out.description: All delegates get same context but different sub-tasks. Claude merges results.
fan_out.when: Complex analysis needing multiple perspectives (security audit, code review, architecture analysis)
fan_out.example: Gemini analyzes architecture + Codex reviews security + Qwen checks performance → Claude synthesizes

pipeline.name: Pipeline / Chain
pipeline.description: Each delegate's output becomes the next delegate's input.
pipeline.example: Gemini researches → Codex implements → Qwen reviews for bugs

debate.name: Debate / Critique
debate.description: One delegate produces, another critiques. Use for critical code requiring high confidence.
debate.when: Security-sensitive code, auth handlers, payment logic, data migrations
debate.example: Codex writes auth handler → Qwen reviews for vulnerabilities → Codex revises

map_reduce.name: Map-Reduce
map_reduce.description: Split large task into chunks across delegates, Claude merges results.
map_reduce.when: Batch operations: review 20 files, test many endpoints, audit multiple services
map_reduce.example: 20 files → Gemini reviews 1-7, Codex reviews 8-14, Qwen reviews 15-20 → Claude merges
